author: FitMom42
title: Charged after trial without clear warning
content: I tried the free trial and then got charged for a yearly subscription. The cancel flow is buried and support took days to reply. Please make billing clearer.

author: YogaJen
title: Subscription trap
content: Hard to cancel the subscription. Apple subscription page works but in-app it keeps pushing annual plans. Refund requested.

author: CardioKate
title: Workouts are good but video lag
content: Love the home workout plans but the trainer videos stutter on Wi-Fi. Following along is frustrating when the stream buffers mid-set.

author: HomeGymHero
title: Can't customize rest timers
content: Between circuits the rest timer is too short and I cannot adjust it. For beginners this makes workouts unusable.

author: StrengthSara
title: Great plans
content: The guided plans keep me consistent. Would love more dumbbell-only filters though.

author: BusyBee
title: App crashes when saving workout
content: Crashes every time I finish and tap save. Lost progress twice this week on iPhone 14.

author: MorningMiles
title: Login loop after update
content: After updating I keep getting signed out. Password reset email never arrives.

author: PilatesPat
title: Solid but too many paywalls
content: Content quality is high. Still, almost every program is behind subscription which hurts discovery for new users.

author: NewbieNell
title: Modifications unclear
content: As a beginner I need clearer exercise modifications. The UI shows advanced moves without easy alternatives.

author: NightOwlFit
title: Notifications spam
content: Marketing notifications are constant even after I disabled workout reminders. Settings seem ignored.

author: RefundRita
title: Unexpected renewal
content: Yearly plan renewed without a reminder email from the app. I only noticed on my bank statement.

author: StreamSam
title: Offline downloads missing
content: Said I could download workouts for gym basement with no signal. Download button does nothing.

author: HappyHaley
title: Finally consistent
content: Best home gym app I've used. The women-focused programming feels practical.

author: DuplicateUser
title: Charged after trial without clear warning
content: I tried the free trial and then got charged for a yearly subscription. The cancel flow is buried and support took days to reply. Please make billing clearer.

author: ConflictCarl
title: Billing was easy for me
content: Canceling subscription via Apple subscriptions was straightforward. Not sure why others struggle.

author: TimerTina
title: Rest timer feedback
content: Please let us set custom rest intervals per exercise. Default 20s is too aggressive.

author: CrashChris
title: Crash on save
content: Same crash when saving workout history. Happens on cellular and Wi-Fi.

author: FilterFaye
title: Need equipment filters
content: Want a filter for no-equipment only. Current filters mix resistance bands into bodyweight plans.

author: PaywallPam
title: Can't try enough free content
content: Free tier is too limited to evaluate the subscription. Conversion suffers because trial content is sparse.

author: StableSteve
title: Mixed feelings on pricing
content: Workouts are useful but annual price feels high versus competitors. Monthly option is easy to miss.
